note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 2.7 cm x 0.9 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 78% slough, 22% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Alginate dressing applied.

Wound note - Rightplantar. Meas 2.7x0.9x0.8cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 52% gran, 48% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Nguyen notified.
